summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink Social Feed feature completed. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing successful - Social Feed page loads with Stories bar, Create Post card, posts feed, AI Media Generator modal, and mobile bottom navigation. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues in 5 endpoints (stories, groups, pages, events, comments, share_post).

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with valid credentials
Backend: GET /api/social/feed - Returns posts feed
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Create text post (no BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Create image post (+20 BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Create video post (+50 BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Create audio post (+30 BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Private post (no BL coins)
Backend: GET /api/social/posts/{id} - Get single post
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/react - Cannot react to own post (400)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/react - Golden thumbs up awards both users 10 BL each
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/react - Silver thumbs down awards only reactor 10 BL
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/react - Reactions are permanent (cannot change)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/comments - First comment earns 10 BL
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/comments - Second comment earns 0 BL
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/comments - Owner comment earns 0 BL
Backend: GET /api/social/posts/{id}/comments - Get comments
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/share - Share post earns 10 BL
Backend: GET /api/stories/ - Get stories
Backend: POST /api/stories/ - Create story (+50 BL for public)
Backend: GET /api/friends/ - Get friends list
Backend: GET /api/friends/requests - Get friend requests
Backend: GET /api/groups/ - Get groups
Backend: POST /api/groups/ - Create group (+40 BL)
Backend: GET /api/pages/ - Get pages
Backend: POST /api/pages/ - Create page (+40 BL)
Backend: GET /api/events/ - Get events
Backend: POST /api/events/ - Create event (+20 BL)
Backend: POST /api/ai-media/estimate-cost - Image cost 200 BL
Backend: POST /api/ai-media/estimate-cost - Video cost 400 BL
Frontend: Login page works
Frontend: Social Feed page loads with Stories bar
Frontend: Create Post card visible with 'What's on your mind' prompt
Frontend: Create Post dialog opens and accepts input
Frontend: AI Media Generator modal opens with Image/Video/Music options
Frontend: Posts feed displays with Like/Comment/Share buttons
Frontend: Mobile view shows bottom navigation
Frontend: Floating AI Create FAB button visible
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in 5 endpoints by using .copy() before insert and .pop('_id', None) after
Reaction system correctly prevents self-reactions and makes reactions permanent
BL coin rewards working correctly: video=50, story=50, group=40, page=40, audio=30, image=20, event=20, reaction=10, comment=10, share=10
Golden thumbs up awards both reactor and post owner 10 BL each
Silver thumbs down only awards reactor 10 BL (post owner gets nothing)
Like button correctly disabled for user's own posts in UI
seed_data_creation: Created test posts, reactions, comments, stories, groups, pages, events during testing. Created test users: test_reactor_*, test_commenter_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Feed feature fully tested and working. Key features verified: Posts with BL coin rewards (video=50, audio=30, image=20), custom reactions (golden thumbs up awards both users, silver thumbs down awards only reactor), permanent reactions, first comment rewards, stories, friends, groups, pages, events, AI media cost estimation. MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues were fixed in social_system.py. Test user test@test.com has accumulated BL coins from testing.
